title: SQL: Mserver crashes on division by 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c REAL, d TEXT);
SELECT a * 1.0 / NULLIF(b, 0) FROM test_division WHERE c > 2.0;
SELECT d, a * 1.0 / NULLIF(c, 0) FROM test_division WHERE b = 0;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL query causes crash
